requirement_topic.en: US Market Access — No Single Mark; Multi-Agency Compliance Stack
requirement_topic.zh: 美国市场准入——无单一标志；多机构合规要求叠加
requirement_topic.zht: 美國市場准入——無單一標誌；多機構合規要求疊加

summary.en: Unlike the EU CE mark (a single conformity declaration covering multiple directives), the US has no unified market-access mark for household refrigerators. Entry requires satisfying a stack of independent federal agency requirements: (1) DOE energy certification (CCMS filing) — administered by the Department of Energy; (2) NRTL electrical safety certification (UL/ETL/CSA mark) — enforced via OSHA; (3) FTC EnergyGuide label — enforced by the Federal Trade Commission; (4) EPA SNAP refrigerant compliance — enforced by EPA; (5) AIM Act Technology Transitions refrigerant GWP compliance — enforced by EPA; (6) FCC Part 15 EMC authorisation — enforced by the Federal Communications Commission; (7) CPSC general product safety — Consumer Product Safety Commission (no specific mandatory standard beyond UL NRTL for this product, but CPSC recall authority applies). State-level energy standards (California Title 20, Washington, Colorado) may impose stricter efficiency requirements than federal DOE standards.
summary.zh: 与欧盟CE标志（涵盖多项指令的单一符合性声明）不同，美国对家用电冰箱没有统一的市场准入标志。进入美国市场须满足多个独立联邦机构要求的叠加：（1）DOE能效认证（CCMS申报）——由能源部管理；（2）NRTL电气安全认证（UL/ETL/CSA标志）——由OSHA执行；（3）FTC能源指南标签——由联邦贸易委员会执行；（4）EPA SNAP制冷剂合规——由EPA执行；（5）AIM法案技术转型制冷剂GWP合规——由EPA执行；（6）FCC第15部分电磁兼容授权——由联邦通信委员会执行；（7）CPSC通用产品安全——消费品安全委员会（本产品类别除NRTL外无具体强制标准，但CPSC召回权限适用）。州级能效标准（加利福尼亚州Title 20、华盛顿州、科罗拉多州）可能比联邦DOE标准规定更严格的能效要求。
summary.zht: 與歐盟CE標誌（涵蓋多項指令的單一符合性聲明）不同，美國對家用電冰箱沒有統一的市場准入標誌。進入美國市場須滿足多個獨立聯邦機構要求的疊加：（1）DOE能效認證（CCMS申報）——由能源部管理；（2）NRTL電氣安全認證（UL/ETL/CSA標誌）——由OSHA執行；（3）FTC能源指南標籤——由聯邦貿易委員會執行；（4）EPA SNAP製冷劑合規——由EPA執行；（5）AIM法案技術轉型製冷劑GWP合規——由EPA執行；（6）FCC第15部分電磁相容授權——由聯邦通信委員會執行；（7）CPSC通用產品安全——消費品安全委員會（本產品類別除NRTL外無具體強制標準，但CPSC召回權限適用）。州級能效標準（加利福尼亞州Title 20、華盛頓州、科羅拉多州）可能比聯邦DOE標準規定更嚴格的能效要求。

standards_or_laws: 10 CFR Part 430 — DOE energy conservation standards and CCMS certification
29 CFR 1910.7 — OSHA NRTL programme (UL/ETL/CSA safety mark)
16 CFR Part 305 — FTC EnergyGuide Appliance Labeling Rule
40 CFR Part 82 Subpart G — EPA SNAP refrigerant acceptability
40 CFR Part 84 Subpart B — EPA AIM Act Technology Transitions
15 U.S.C. § 2051 et seq. — Consumer Product Safety Act (CPSC authority)

summary.en: China uses a centralised CCC (China Compulsory Certification) system administered by CNCA, which combines electrical safety (GB 4706.13), EMC (GB 4343.1), and energy (GB 12021.2) into a single compulsory certification mark for household refrigerators. The energy label (CEL) is a separate parallel requirement. The CCC-plus-CEL system is more consolidated than the US multi-agency stack. Neither the CCC mark nor the CEL label satisfies any US federal requirement.
summary.zh: 中国采用由CNCA管理的集中式CCC（中国强制认证）体系，将家用电冰箱的电气安全（GB 4706.13）、电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）和能效（GB 12021.2）整合为单一强制认证标志。能效标识（CEL）为独立的并行要求。CCC加CEL体系比美国多机构要求更为集中统一。CCC标志和CEL标签均不满足任何美国联邦要求。
summary.zht: 中國採用由CNCA管理的集中式CCC（中國強制認證）體系，將家用電冰箱的電氣安全（GB 4706.13）、電磁相容（GB 4343.1）和能效（GB 12021.2）整合為單一強制認證標誌。能效標識（CEL）為獨立的並行要求。CCC加CEL體系比美國多機構要求更為集中統一。CCC標誌和CEL標籤均不滿足任何美國聯邦要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA mandatory scheme covering GB 4706.13, GB 4343.1, GB 12021.2 for household refrigerators)
CEL — China Energy Label (NDRC/SAMR, based on GB 12021.2)

gap.en: The structural gap is that there is no Chinese CCC-to-US equivalence. Each US federal agency requirement must be satisfied independently. The typical compliance sequence for a Chinese refrigerator exporter is: (1) Engage NRTL for UL 60335-2-24 safety testing and certification; (2) Test to 10 CFR 430 procedures at an accredited laboratory and file DOE CCMS certification; (3) Design and affix FTC EnergyGuide label using CCMS data; (4) Verify refrigerant SNAP acceptability and AIM Act GWP status; (5) Test and obtain FCC Part 15 SDoC (plus FCC ID for any wireless modules); (6) Verify state-level energy requirements for target distribution states. Typical compliance timeline: 6–12 months. Typical third-party cost: USD 30,000–80,000+ depending on product range and wireless complexity.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于不存在中国CCC与美国要求的等同互认。每项美国联邦机构要求须独立满足。中国冰箱出口商的典型合规流程为：（1）委托NRTL进行UL 60335-2-24安全测试和认证；（2）在认可实验室按10 CFR 430程序进行测试并提交DOE CCMS认证报告；（3）使用CCMS数据设计并粘贴FTC能源指南标签；（4）核实制冷剂SNAP可接受性及AIM法案GWP状态；（5）测试并取得FCC第15部分SDoC（如有无线模块还需取得FCC ID）；（6）针对目标销售州核实州级能效要求。典型合规周期：6—12个月。典型第三方费用：30,000—80,000美元以上（视产品范围和无线复杂程度而定）。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於不存在中國CCC與美國要求的等同互認。每項美國聯邦機構要求須獨立滿足。中國冰箱出口商的典型合規流程為：（1）委託NRTL進行UL 60335-2-24安全測試和認證；（2）在認可實驗室按10 CFR 430程序進行測試並提交DOE CCMS認證報告；（3）使用CCMS數據設計並貼附FTC能源指南標籤；（4）核實製冷劑SNAP可接受性及AIM法案GWP狀態；（5）測試並取得FCC第15部分SDoC（如有無線模組還需取得FCC ID）；（6）針對目標銷售州核實州級能效要求。典型合規週期：6—12個月。典型第三方費用：30,000—80,000美元以上（視產品範圍和無線複雜程度而定）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — all six federal agency requirements listed above are independently mandatory for US market entry; no single mark covers all
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (single mark covering safety + EMC + energy) plus CEL energy label for Chinese domestic market

source.publisher: US Department of Energy (DOE) — Appliance and Equipment Standards Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The US has no single market-access mark equivalent to China CCC. Chinese exporters must satisfy at least six independent federal agency requirements (DOE, NRTL/OSHA, FTC, EPA x2, FCC) plus applicable state energy standards. CCC and CEL marks do not satisfy any US requirement. Plan 6–12 months and USD 30,000–80,000+ in third-party compliance costs before first US shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】美国没有与中国CCC等同的单一市场准入标志。中国出口商须满足至少六项独立联邦机构要求（DOE、NRTL/OSHA、FTC、EPA两项、FCC），以及适用的州级能效标准。CCC和CEL标志不满足任何美国要求。首次发货前须规划6—12个月、30,000—80,000美元以上的第三方合规费用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】美國沒有與中國CCC等同的單一市場准入標誌。中國出口商須滿足至少六項獨立聯邦機構要求（DOE、NRTL/OSHA、FTC、EPA兩項、FCC），以及適用的州級能效標準。CCC和CEL標誌不滿足任何美國要求。首次發貨前須規劃6—12個月、30,000—80,000美元以上的第三方合規費用。

requirement_topic.en: DOE CCMS Certification Filing — Importer as Manufacturer
requirement_topic.zh: DOE CCMS认证申报——进口商作为制造商
requirement_topic.zht: DOE CCMS認證申報——進口商作為製造商

summary.en: Under DOE energy conservation regulations, the entity that manufactures or imports covered products for sale in the US is the 'manufacturer' for compliance purposes. A Chinese factory exporting to the US is not required to file with DOE directly — the US importer or brand-owner who places the product on the US market is responsible for the DOE CCMS certification filing. The importer must file the certification report (including model number, product class, volume, and DOE-tested energy consumption) in DOE's online CCMS system before the first product is offered for sale. Annual certification updates are required if the model continues in production. Importers may rely on test data from an accredited laboratory contracted by the Chinese manufacturer, but the importer bears legal responsibility for the accuracy of the DOE filing.
summary.zh: 依据DOE能效法规，在美国制造或进口相关产品进行销售的主体，在合规意义上即为"制造商"。向美国出口的中国工厂无需直接向DOE申报——将产品投放美国市场的美国进口商或品牌所有人，负责提交DOE CCMS认证报告。进口商须在首次产品上市销售前，在DOE在线CCMS系统中提交认证报告（包括型号、产品类别、容积及DOE测试能耗数据）。若型号持续生产，则须每年更新认证。进口商可以使用中国制造商委托认可实验室出具的测试数据，但进口商承担DOE申报准确性的法律责任。
summary.zht: 依據DOE能效法規，在美國製造或進口相關產品進行銷售的主體，在合規意義上即為「製造商」。向美國出口的中國工廠無需直接向DOE申報——將產品投放美國市場的美國進口商或品牌所有人，負責提交DOE CCMS認證報告。進口商須在首次產品上市銷售前，在DOE在線CCMS系統中提交認證報告（包括型號、產品類別、容積及DOE測試能耗數據）。若型號持續生產，則須每年更新認證。進口商可以使用中國製造商委託認可實驗室出具的測試數據，但進口商承擔DOE申報準確性的法律責任。

standards_or_laws: 10 CFR Part 429 — Certification, compliance, and enforcement for consumer products (DOE CCMS filing requirements)
42 U.S.C. § 6295(s) — Civil penalty provisions for energy conservation standard violations

summary.en: In China, the manufacturer (Chinese factory) directly applies for CCC certification to a CNCA-designated certification body. The Chinese factory bears direct regulatory responsibility for the CCC mark. There is no US-equivalent concept of transferring manufacturer status to an importer — in China, the actual production entity is always the certificate holder. This structural difference means Chinese exporters are accustomed to being the certification holder, whereas for US DOE compliance, the US importer holds filing responsibility.
summary.zh: 在中国，制造商（中国工厂）直接向CNCA指定的认证机构申请CCC认证，中国工厂直接承担CCC标志的监管责任。中国不存在将制造商身份转移给进口商的美国对应概念——在中国，实际生产主体始终是证书持有人。这一结构性差异意味着中国出口商习惯于作为认证持有人，而对于美国DOE合规，美国进口商承担申报责任。
summary.zht: 在中國，製造商（中國工廠）直接向CNCA指定的認證機構申請CCC認證，中國工廠直接承擔CCC標誌的監管責任。中國不存在將製造商身份轉移給進口商的美國對應概念——在中國，實際生產主體始終是證書持有人。這一結構性差異意味著中國出口商習慣於作為認證持有人，而對於美國DOE合規，美國進口商承擔申報責任。

standards_or_laws: CCC Administrative Regulations (CNCA) — Chinese manufacturer as direct certificate holder

gap.en: Chinese exporters selling directly to the US market (without a US importer intermediary) must register as the manufacturer in DOE CCMS and file certification reports themselves. Chinese exporters selling through US importers or brand-owners should contractually clarify which party files the DOE CCMS report — failure to file is a strict-liability DOE violation regardless of which party is at fault. Civil penalties are per unit per day of non-compliance. The CCMS filing is free of charge (no government filing fee) but requires accurate laboratory test data and model-level detail.
gap.zh: 直接向美国市场销售（无美国进口商中间方）的中国出口商，须在DOE CCMS中以制造商身份注册并自行提交认证报告。通过美国进口商或品牌所有人销售的中国出口商，应在合同中明确由哪方提交DOE CCMS报告——无论哪方存在过错，未申报均构成DOE严格责任违规。民事罚款按每单位每天不合规计算。CCMS申报免收政府申报费，但须提供准确的实验室测试数据和机型级别详细信息。
gap.zht: 直接向美國市場銷售（無美國進口商中間方）的中國出口商，須在DOE CCMS中以製造商身份注冊並自行提交認證報告。通過美國進口商或品牌所有人銷售的中國出口商，應在合同中明確由哪方提交DOE CCMS報告——無論哪方存在過錯，未申報均構成DOE嚴格責任違規。民事罰款按每單位每天不合規計算。CCMS申報免收政府申報費，但須提供準確的實驗室測試數據和機型級別詳細信息。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CCMS filing by the US-market manufacturer (importer or brand-owner) required before first sale; civil penalty up to $503 per unit per day
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC application by the Chinese factory (production entity) to a CNCA-designated certification body

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DOE CCMS filing responsibility rests with the US-market manufacturer (the importer or brand-owner who places the product on the US market), not the Chinese factory. Chinese exporters must contractually clarify this responsibility with their US partners. Filing must be completed before first US sale; civil penalties apply per unit per day of non-compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】DOE CCMS申报责任由美国市场制造商（将产品投放美国市场的进口商或品牌所有人）承担，而非中国工厂。中国出口商须与美国合作方在合同中明确该责任归属。须在首次美国销售前完成申报，违规按每单位每天计算民事罚款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】DOE CCMS申報責任由美國市場製造商（將產品投放美國市場的進口商或品牌所有人）承擔，而非中國工廠。中國出口商須與美國合作方在合同中明確該責任歸屬。須在首次美國銷售前完成申報，違規按每單位每天計算民事罰款。
